expectations.evidence: Note clearly states 'ANC Contact: 6 of 8 (scheduled at 36 weeks)' in the Patient Summary section.

Fetal presentation is explicitly assessed: 'Fetal presentation: Cephalic (confirmed by abdominal palpation)' in the Assessments Required section. Also noted in the assessment matrix as a Contact 6 requirement.

expectations.text: Birth preparedness and complication readiness counseled
expectations.evidence: Comprehensive 'Birth Preparedness and Complication Readiness' subsection under Counseling Topics covers delivery facility confirmation, transport plan, birth companion, packed bag, savings, and emergency contact numbers.

Dedicated 'Breastfeeding Counseling' subsection covers early initiation within 1 hour, exclusive breastfeeding for 6 months, positioning and attachment, common challenges, and references patient's prior successful breastfeeding experience.
Next Contact section explicitly states: 'Scheduled at 38 weeks (Contact 7)' with preparation items listed.
